hero.label: DELROM · RÍO PIEDRAS, PUERTO RICO
hero.headline: Where every arrival
hero.description: A thoughtfully designed hospitality space in San Juan — blending comfort, style, and curated details for an unforgettable stay.

about.label: 01 — About
about.headline: A home
about.headlineEnd:
from home,
in the heart of San Juan.
about.description: DelRom is a thoughtfully designed hospitality space created to offer comfort, style, and a welcoming experience in every stay. It is meant to feel like a home away from home, blending functionality with carefully curated details that enhance each guest's experience. Its strategic location provides easy access to shopping areas, beaches, and key points of interest, making it an ideal choice for both leisure and business travelers. At DelRom, every stay is defined by ease, convenience, and an atmosphere that invites you to return.

gallery.label: 02 — Gallery
gallery.headline: Every corner,
gallery.description: Clean lines, warm materials, and thoughtful details throughout.

location.label: 04 — Location
location.headline: Río Piedras,
location.description: Strategically located in the vibrant Río Piedras neighborhood — a cultural and commercial hub giving you fast access to everything San Juan has to offer, whether you're here for business or leisure.

highlights.shoppingDetail: Plaza Las Américas & local markets nearby
highlights.beachesDetail: Condado & Isla Verde beaches minutes away
highlights.diningDetail: Diverse food scene at your doorstep
highlights.airportDetail: SJU Luis Muñoz Marín ~20 min away

contact.label: 05 — Book Your Stay
contact.headline: Ready to experience
contact.description: Book directly through Booking.com for the best rates, or reach out via email for any questions about your stay.
